name: Unexpected Courage
text: Attach to a hero. Limit 1 per hero. Action: Exhaust Unexpected Courage to ready attached hero.

name: Vigilant Dúnadan
text: While there is a side quest in the victory display, Vigilant Dúnadan may defend without exhausting up to 3 times each round.

name: Greenwood Defender
text: Response: After Greenwood Defender enters play, it may defend without exhausting up to 3 times until the end of the round.

name: Hour of Wrath
text: Action: Choose a hero. Until the end of the phase, the chosen hero may attack without exhausting up to 3 times and defend whout exhausting up to 3 times. Valour Action: Choose a player. Until the end of the phase, each of that player’s heroes may attack without exhausting up to 3 times and defend whout exhausting up to 3 times.

name: Rossiel
text: Rossiel gets +1 [willpower] and +1 [defense] for each different encounter card type in the victory display. Action: Spend 1 resource from Rossiel’s pool to add the top card of the encounter discard pile to the victory display. (Limit 3 times per game.)

name: Dori
text: Action: Exhaust Dori to declare him as an additional defender of an attack that another character is defending.

name: Fatty Bolger
text: Quest Action: Exhaust Fatty Bolger to choose an enemy in the staging area and engage it. At the end of the phase, return it to the staging area. (Limit once per round.)

name: Bombur
text: X is the number of Dwarf characters you control (to a maximum of 13). When counting the number of Dwarf characters you control, Bombur counts as two.

name: Na’asiyah
text: Na’asiyah’s resources cannot be spent on allies. Response: After an enemy engaged with you is destroyed, add 1 resource to Na’asiyah’s pool. (Limit once per phase.) Action: Spend 1 resource from Na’asiyah’s pool to give her +2 [attack] or +2 [defense] until the end of the phase.

name: Pippin
text: Response: After an enemy engages you, raise your threat by 2 to return it to the staging area. Until the end of the round, that enemy does not make engagement checks.

name: Dwalin
text: Response: After Dwalin attacks and destroys an enemy, reduce your threat by 2.

name: Faramir
text: Faramir gets +1 [attack] for each enemy with a Trap attachment. Travel Action: Return an enemy engaged with you to the staging area to ready Faramir.

name: Óin
text: While you control at least 5 Dwarf characters, Óin gets +1 [attack], gains the [tactics] resource icon, and readies at the beginning of each combat phase.

name: Glorfindel
text: Action: Either discard a card from your hand or pay 1 resource from Glorfindel’s pool to heal 2 damage on any character. (Limit once per round.)

name: Warden of Healing
text: Action: Exhaust Warden of Healing to heal 1 damage from up to 2 different characters (only 1 character instead if you have already triggered the ability of a Warden of Healing this round).
